path: PNGS/3 Things that should never be delayed 1.png
text: Ali bin Abi Talib narrated that: The Messenger of Allah said to him: *O (Ali! Three are not to be delayed: Salat when it is due, the funeral when it is presented, and (marriage) for the single woman when someone compatible is. found." Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) [ —— 2 Jami" at-Tirmidhi 1075
